Tilman Riemenschneider

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Saint Jerome and the Lion (From the former Church of St. Peter in Erfurt)
by Tilman Riemenschneider
Germany, Würzburg, late 15th Century · c. 1495 · alabaster, traces of polychromy
Saint Lawrence
by Tilman Riemenschneider
Germany, Würzburg, 16th century · 1502–8 · lindenwood with polychromy and gilding
Saint Stephen
by Tilman Riemenschneider
Germany, Würzburg, 16th century · 1502–8 · lindenwood with polychromy and gilding
